title: Map Email/Contact on the Email address of the mail received
excerpt: Hi, I would like to receive mail to a board, on the mail received it must map the contact based on the From email address of the mail received.  I have a mapped (mirrored) Contact board, that can join Contact to the new …

posts.author: riaan.jacobs (Riaan Jacobs)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I would like to receive mail to a board, on the mail received it must map the contact based on the From email address of the mail received. I have a mapped (mirrored) Contact board, that can join Contact to the new entry based on emails address.
